rows.label: empty_prompt
rows.design_intent: Strip the prompt to a single word. Expect fitness to drop sharply.

rows.label: lorem_ipsum
rows.design_intent: Replace the instruction with Latin filler. Expect total breakdown.

rows.label: force_number
rows.design_intent: Force the model into the wrong output type for an entity-answer task.

rows.label: refusal
rows.design_intent: Make the agent refuse to answer. Expect zero correct.

rows.label: anti_search
rows.design_intent: Tools in the registry but prompt forbids them. Effectively single-shot.

rows.label: max_steps_1
rows.design_intent: Allow only one search step. Borderline — might still answer some questions.

rows.label: unconditional_reflection
rows.design_intent: Known from §3.6 to drop val ~14pp. Test whether guard catches it.

rows.label: overconfidence_prompt
rows.design_intent: Subtle: keeps real instructions but forces over-confidence. Might pass val by accident, likely to swap some canary answers.
